---
name: 'RichCluster'
description: 'An Rcpp library for performing hierarchical clustering on multiple enriched genomics datasets.'
tags: ['R', 'C++', 'Clustering', 'Genomics']
image: 'https://private-user-images.githubusercontent.com/114366569/423184573-f5c857bc-8547-445f-be15-b9a1102f76f4.jpeg?jwt=eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..Gp_5btEfFEz2YwpJsej_T83lVVmfEEj_ExTsqoGGLp4'

endDate: '2025-05-01'
---
An Rcpp library for performing hierarchical clustering on multiple enriched genomics datasets. 
Clusters different biological 'terms' based on overlapping gene content. 
Coded in C++ for fast clustering, with customizable linkage / distance metrics and supporting visualizations.
